description: Root cause analysis entries with validated solutions

entries.problem: Scripts cannot import from src.xxx when run from backend/ directory
entries.root_cause: PYTHONPATH=/app/src in docker-compose.yml — Python searches for /app/src/src/__init__.py instead of /app/src/__init__.py
entries.prevention: Document .pth recreation step. Consider adding to Docker entrypoint.

entries.problem: Search endpoint returns 500 — pgvector rejects embedding format
entries.root_cause: Embedding serialized as Python string representation of list instead of PostgreSQL array literal
contributing_factors: Missing documentation on pgvector array format
No integration test for vector insertion
entries.successful_resolution: Use '\'{' + ','.join(map(str, values)) + '}\'' format for pgvector array literals
entries.prevention: Add pgvector format test. Document in architecture notes.
